title: Phoenix Feather Wand (Harry's Wand)
description: Resource pack for a wand with a phoenix feather. (Requires Optifine)
body:
This resource pack allows you to turn an ordinary stick into a Harry Potter wand simply by renaming it on an anvil. At first glance the wand looks shabby and dirty, but this is explained in these lines from the book Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire - *Harry glanced at his wand. She was all covered with gouges and fingerprints. He secretly tried to wipe the wand...*. The resource pack contains two types of wands: a regular version and a wand with the Incendio spell. To get a regular magic wand, take a regular stick and change its name to magic wand with the Incendio spell, take a torch and change its name to Incendio Wand. To get a Incendio Wand !![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/205a73e0b2d92402d2ea3deba020e0be8d3cfe2b.png)(the texture of the torch as a block will remain the same). The second wand goes well with the Dynamic Lighting mod, because then the wand really emits light like a torch. For now, the resource pack requires optifine and cannot work without it. But I'm going to make a version for fabric (you'll need Cit Resevn) and a version that will simply replace the textures of the stick and torch with magic wands. Also, the Incendio Wand has a broken texture, just one black cube, but it's a bit noticeable. If I have time, I'll try to fix the texture. I would be very grateful if you supported the project and me with a donation. Thank you all for your attention.

[Support me on PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=ZY6NQ5T2YTB6C)
